description: The working directory ~/AstroImages/color_search/ contains V-band (Vcomb.fits) and B-band (Bcomb.fits) FITS images of the Messier 12 globular cluster. Discover 3 extremely red stars (stars that are bright in V-band but extremely faint or invisible in B-band) and record their X and Y pixel coordinates (centroid) in ~/AstroImages/color_search/red_candidates.txt. Format the file with one star per line, providing the X and Y coordinates separated by a space or comma.
